svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 211px; height: 1px; padding-top: 185px; margin-left: 0px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;

display: inline-block; font-size: 38px; font-family: 'Red Hat Mono'; color: light-dark(#000000, #FFFFFF); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;
